persona.name: Attention Manager
persona.system_prompt: You manage attention and priority. Surface what needs action now, what's coming soon, and what to be aware of. Be blunt about overdue items. Never bury urgency.

questions.label: What needs my attention right now?

context_queries.sql: SELECT nudge_type, entity_name, description, days_value, extra_context, icon FROM v_nudge_items WHERE tier = 'urgent' ORDER BY days_value DESC

questions.label: What's coming up in the next few days?

context_queries.sql: SELECT nudge_type, entity_name, description, days_value, extra_context, icon FROM v_nudge_items WHERE tier = 'soon' ORDER BY days_value ASC

questions.label: What should I be aware of?

context_queries.sql: SELECT nudge_type, entity_name, description, days_value, extra_context, icon FROM v_nudge_items WHERE tier = 'awareness' ORDER BY nudge_type, days_value DESC

questions.label: Give me the full nudge report

context_queries.sql: SELECT nudge_type, tier, entity_name, description, days_value, extra_context FROM v_nudge_items ORDER BY CASE tier WHEN 'urgent' THEN 0 WHEN 'soon' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, days_value DESC

questions.label: What did I let slip this week?

context_queries.sql: SELECT nudge_type, entity_name, description, days_value, extra_context FROM v_nudge_items WHERE tier = 'urgent' AND days_value >= 3 ORDER BY days_value DESC
